frameworkDesc:
<sprite=0 tint>Defeat all the Shadows to gain 25 ChocoPower points.
<sprite=0 tint>Gain <color=#FFFC40><link="chocolate|1"><u>buffs</u></link></color> based on the ChocoPower you gain. ChocoPower is limited to 25 in this stage.
<sprite=0 tint>By gaining ChocoPower, you will be able to use <color=#FFFC40><link="chocolate|2"><u>Love Bomb</u></link></color> in the boss stage.

<sprite=0 tint>Each Shadow absorbs particular attributes. When a Shadow's HP is fully restored, you will gain 25 ChocoPower points and defeat the Shadow.
<sprite=0 tint>Gain <color=#FFFC40><link="chocolate|1"><u>buffs</u></link></color> based on the ChocoPower you gain. ChocoPower is limited to 75 in this stage.
<sprite=0 tint>By gaining ChocoPower, you will be able to use <color=#FFFC40><link="chocolate|2"><u>Love Bomb</u></link></color> in the boss stage.

<sprite=0 tint>Defeat all the Shadows to gain 25 ChocoPower points.
<sprite=0 tint>Gain <color=#FFFC40><link="chocolate|1"><u>buffs</u></link></color> based on the ChocoPower you gain. ChocoPower is limited to 25 in this stage.
<sprite=0 tint>By gaining ChocoPower, you will be able to use <color=#FFFC40><link="chocolate|2"><u>Love Bomb</u></link></color> in the boss stage.

<sprite=0 tint>When you defeat a Shadow, the same Shadow immediately respawns. Gain 5 ChocoPower points upon defeating Inugami, 10 points upon defeating Quetzalcoatl, and 15 points upon defeating Lamia. Reach 40 actions to clear the challenge.
<sprite=0 tint>Gain <color=#FFFC40><link="chocolate|1"><u>buffs</u></link></color> based on the ChocoPower you gain. ChocoPower is limited to 75 in this stage.
<sprite=0 tint>By gaining ChocoPower, you will be able to use <color=#FFFC40><link="chocolate|2"><u>Love Bomb</u></link></color> in the boss stage.

<sprite=0 tint>Defeat all the Shadows to gain 25 ChocoPower points.
<sprite=0 tint>Gain <color=#FFFC40><link="chocolate|1"><u>buffs</u></link></color> based on the ChocoPower you gain. ChocoPower is limited to 25 in this stage.
<sprite=0 tint>By gaining ChocoPower, you will be able to use <color=#FFFC40><link="chocolate|2"><u>Love Bomb</u></link></color> in the boss stage.

<sprite=0 tint>At the beginning of Lilith's turn, if Amoribbon is not present, Lilith will summon Amoribbon. Defeat Amoribbon to gain 25 ChocoPower points. If Amoribbon captures a Phantom Thief, it will drain 10 of the ChocoPower points gained during this battle.
<sprite=0 tint>Defeat all the Shadows to gain 25 ChocoPower points.
<sprite=0 tint>Gain <color=#FFFC40><link="chocolate|1"><u>buffs</u></link></color> based on the ChocoPower you gain. ChocoPower is limited to 25 in this stage.
<sprite=0 tint>By gaining ChocoPower, you will be able to use <color=#FFFC40><link="chocolate|2"><u>Love Bomb</u></link></color> in the boss stage.

<sprite=0 tint>Vasuki has different weaknesses and resistances than normal. All of its affinities are Resist.
<sprite=0 tint>When Leanan Sidhe or Lamia use skills, they will steal 15 ChocoPower from the Phantom Thieves and grant 20 ChocoPower to Vasuki. When Vasuki's ChocoPower reaches 100 points, it will spend its ChocoPower to unleash a Makajamaon against all Phantom Thieves.
<sprite=0 tint>Defeat Leanan Sidhe or Lamia to gain 25 ChocoPower points.
<sprite=0 tint>You can use <color=#FFFC40><link="chocolate|2"><u>Love Bomb</u></link></color> by spending 100 ChocoPower points. By using <color=#FFFC40><link="chocolate|2"><u>Love Bomb</u></link></color>, you can change all of the target's affinities to Weak.
<sprite=0 tint>At the start of battle, you will have the total amount of ChocoPower points you earned in the previous 6 stages, and you can gain <color=#FFFC40><link="chocolate|1"><u>buffs</u></link></color> based on the ChocoPower you gain.
